article_title: Bylaw 14757 — Housing Agreement (4281 Grange Street) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby Housing Agreement Locks 4281 Grange Street Units as Non-Market Rental
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council adopted Bylaw 14757 on August 26, 2025, authorising a legally binding housing agreement with Qualex-Landmark Orchard Holdings Ltd. requiring designated units at 4281 Grange Street to remain non-market rental housing, with rent and tenant eligibility tied to BC Housing Income Limits.
briefs.action_required: If you own or manage this property, ensure all required inclusionary units are rented only to eligible tenants at approved rent levels per the agreement.
briefs.article_title: Bylaw 14757 — Housing Agreement (4281 Grange Street) Bylaw 2025
